| Google service account JSON | See `GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS` in MSC / VPE env | MSC Vertex LiteLLM, Node-Launcher |
| Google OAuth token (personal) | `%LOCALAPPDATA%\hermes\profiles\jonbeatz\google_token.json` | Hermes google-workspace skill, `npm run google:doctor` |
| Google OAuth client secret | `%LOCALAPPDATA%\hermes\profiles\jonbeatz\google_client_secret.json` | Hermes OAuth desktop client |
| Google OAuth token (legacy) | `%LOCALAPPDATA%\hermes\google_token.json` | Bridged to profile path by `deepseek-doctor.ps1` |
| Google OAuth token (VPE) | See `GOOGLE_TOKEN_PATH` in VPE env (`google-api\token.json`) | Node-Launcher google-workspace MCP â€” copy from profile if missing |
| ComfyUI install | `H:\AI_Models\ComfyUI` (`COMFYUI_ROOT`) | Image gen, 3DGenStudio |
| Vader Vault | `H:\Vader_Vault` | vault MCP, cross-project memory |
| Mem0 Qdrant stores | `%USERPROFILE%\.mem0\qdrant_*` | Per-profile memory |
